name: Pal MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server from BeehiveInnovations providing a collection of utility tools for AI agent workflows. Pal (Personal AI Library) exposes practical tools for agents including file operations, system queries, and workflow utilities — positioned as a general-purpose productivity MCP server for AI assistants.
use_cases: Providing utility tools to AI agents for file and system operations
Extending AI assistant capabilities with local system access
Building AI workflows on top of Pal's general-purpose tool collection
Enabling AI agents to perform common productivity tasks locally
not_for: Specific service integrations (use service-specific MCPs for those)
Cloud-based or server deployments requiring remote access
Teams needing strict operation auditing and sandboxing
best_when: A developer wants a well-maintained general-purpose MCP server providing useful utility tools for local AI agent workflows — Pal's high star count indicates strong community adoption and quality.
avoid_when: You need specific service integrations. Pal provides general utilities — not a replacement for service-specific MCPs.

auth.notes: No authentication — local MCP server. Access controlled by local system permissions.

pricing.notes: Free open source from BeehiveInnovations. No costs.

known_agent_gotchas: 11k+ stars indicates high popularity — review which specific tools are bundled before deployment
General utility tools may have broad local system access — review permissions carefully
Tool scope varies by version — check current tool list against your agent's use case
Local execution means agent actions affect the host system directly
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local MCP server. No credentials. Tools may access local filesystem and system resources — review tool permissions. High star count indicates active community vetting.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local tool execution. Review bundled tools for local system access scope. No external credentials.
